entities.name: SMALL-SCALE IRRIGATION SCHEMES
entities.description: Systems of irrigation on a small scale that may be dysfunctional and require sustainable transitions

entities.name: LEARNING
entities.description: The process of acquiring knowledge or skills to facilitate change and transitions

entities.name: INNOVATION
entities.description: The implementation of new ideas to improve farming and irrigation systems

entities.name: EVALUATION
entities.description: The process of assessing irrigation schemes to facilitate sustainable transitions

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE TRANSITIONS
entities.description: The process of moving dysfunctional irrigation schemes toward a sustainable state

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE AND QUALITATIVE DATA
entities.description: Data types used to analyze learning and change in irrigation schemes

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region where the analyzed irrigation schemes are located

entities.name: SOIL MONITORING TOOLS
entities.description: Tools used to monitor soil that trigger deep learning cycles

entities.name: DEEP LEARNING CYCLE
entities.description: A specific cycle of learning triggered by the use of soil monitoring tools

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INNOVATION PLATFORMS
entities.description: Platforms that facilitate the development of social learning systems

entities.name: SOCIAL LEARNING SYSTEM
entities.description: A system of learning developed through agricultural innovation platforms

entities.name: KNOWLEDGE GENERATION
entities.description: The process of producing new knowledge driven by farming incentives

entities.name: PROFITABLE FARMING
entities.description: The economic incentive of increased profit that drives innovation and knowledge generation

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL CHANGE
entities.description: Profound changes in extension and governance stakeholders resulting from learning
